{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Blood of Beelzebub
|class_id=20282
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=
|description=As the Demon Lord in charge of diseases, Beelzebub's contractees often died a painful death because they couldn't take the Plague Contract. This has reduced the completion progress of the Demon Lord's contract. In order to rebuild the reputation of the Demon Pact and attract more servants, the Demon Lords have all agreed to find a replacement for Beelzebub.
|fame=13
|art=15
|fth=32
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=With the power of Beelzebub:<br>Demon Minion HARD Stats +0.4%<br>In All Forms, Snail HP +200
|ss2=With the power of Beelzebub:<br>Demon Minion HARD Stats +0.8%<br>In All Forms, Snail HP +400
|ss3=With the power of Beelzebub:<br>Demon Minion HARD Stats +1.2%<br>In All Forms, Snail HP +600
}}

[[Category:Demon Minion HARD Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
